actionUnits.condition: Automatic ignite path. MonoBehaviour_0 on this GameObject uses script GUID 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d (Fire), matching the provided source. BoxCollider present (m_IsTrigger=0), no Rigidbody. To cover Update() branch for auto turn-on: ensure onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold (2) via neighbor Fire objects so that CheckNeighborState() sets shouldTurnOn=true. Then wait until timeToOn elapses (Awake sets timeToOn between timeToOnMin=40 and timeToOnMax=60). Expected: isOn becomes true, isTurningOff=false, timers reset, UpdateFireState(true) plays particle system on mainEffectGo (fileID 1849464941111748095), notifies neighbors, and calls FireController.Instance.FireChanged(1).

Water extinguish path while fire is ON. Simulate continuous water contact invoking IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(normal) repeatedly within maxHitInterval (2s) so that isTurningOff remains true and currentHitTime accumulates past totalHitTime=5s. Expected: upon reaching totalHitTime, fire turns off (isOn=false), shouldTurnOn=false, timers reset, UpdateFireState(true) stops particle system and calls FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1).

Hit-interval reset path. With fire ON, apply a short water hit (invoking WaterHit once, starting isTurningOff and resetting currentHitInterval to 0). Do NOT apply further hits for more than maxHitInterval.

No additional water hits for > maxHitInterval (2s). Expected: isTurningOff becomes false and currentHitTime resets (< totalHitTime), so fire remains ON; covers the branch where extinguishing is canceled due to exceeding maxHitInterval.
